title: Paul Anthony 'Pro Series P200' Corded Hair Clipper- Lightweight - Self Sharpening Stainless Steel Blades - 4 Interchangeable Comb Guides - Precision Taper - Powerful Quiet Motor - Black/Orange - H5124
features: SELF SHARPENING STAINLESS STEEL BLADES: Ultra sharp blades oscillate rapidly for a smoother cut, whilst continuing to sharpen.
INTERCHANGABLE COMB GUIDE ATTACHMENTS: 3mm, 6mm, 9mm and 12 mm guides allow you to achieve a variety of lengths and styles.
ACCESSORIES: Inside the box are scissors, barber's comb, lubricating oil and a cleaning brush, making this the perfect kit.
PRECISION TAPER ADJUSTMENT LEVER: This allows you to have greater control over the level of detail within the cutting process.
description: Product Description The Paul Anthony 'Pro Series P200' Corded Hair Clipper is an ergonomic, easy to use lightweight design bringing hair styling to your home. It's self sharpening stainless steel blades are ultra sharp, giving you a smoother cut. This kit comes with scissors, a barber's comb, lubricating oil and a cleaning brush, providing everything you need to get that salon groomed look. This product has a precision taper adjustment lever, this allows you to have greater control over the level of detail within the cutting process. Includes 4 popular sized cutting combs, #1 (3mm), #2 (6mm), #3(9mm and #4 (12mm) Just plug the power cord into a suitable 220-240v-50Hz mains supply and you're ready to go! Box Includes The Paul Anthony 'Pro Series P200' Corded Hair Clipper Scissors Barber's Comb Lubricating Oil Cleaning Brush Instruction Manual Safety Warning [General safety warnings apply, including electrical safety and keeping out of reach of children]
